# Colophon {.unnumbered}

::: {.colophon}
Published by [sanblue^dot^]{.sanblue-mark}

::: {.colophon-sub}
retro dev-station · Ecuador
:::

::: {.colophon-meta}
*The AI Robot Race and Its Hidden Cost* — A 10-Year Outlook (2025–2035).
Built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org). Every figure traced to a primary or authoritative source.
:::
:::
